raw_consumer_statement: There were many charges from XXXX and XXXX of XXXX that were not charged by us. In the statements submitted to them ( and again by an attorney of which they have not responded ), the total charges for the amount of almost {$12000.00}, plus interest charged on those amounts. The fraud department contacted us and we reviewed the charges with them. Then, they denied the dispute. They claimed that the charges were made by me in person because a chip was used. I believe thieves have figured out how to clone a chip card. There are multiple charges in the same day to the same places. Most of these places, you will not see on our normal charges in the past or since then. In addition, I had a very depressed XXXX XXXX because I had a XXXX  and wasn't going anywhere during that time, other than doctor 's offices. I have been a loyal customer for nearly 40 years and am stunned that they have refused to cooperate.
